requirement_topic.en: Minimum Energy Performance Standard — Household Refrigerators (KEBS/EPRA MEPS, KS IEC/ISO test basis)
requirement_topic.zh: 最低能效标准——家用电冰箱（KEBS/EPRA最低能效标准，KS IEC/ISO测试基础）
requirement_topic.zht: 最低能效標準——家用電冰箱（KEBS/EPRA最低能效標準，KS IEC/ISO測試基礎）

summary.en: Household refrigerators sold in Kenya are subject to minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) administered jointly through the Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority (EPRA) and the Kenya Bureau of Standards (KEBS). Kenya operates a Standards and Labelling programme for energy-using appliances under the Energy Act, with KEBS publishing the relevant Kenya Standard specifying minimum energy efficiency thresholds and the test methodology (Kenyan adoptions of the IEC 62552 / ISO 15502 household refrigerating appliance test-method standards). Refrigerators that fail the MEPS threshold may not be legally placed on the Kenyan market, and the energy performance is verified as part of the KEBS PVoC conformity assessment for imported units. The measured annual energy consumption and efficiency class underpin the mandatory Kenyan energy efficiency label (see frigke-energy-002).
summary.zh: 在肯尼亚销售的家用电冰箱须遵守由能源与石油监管局（EPRA）和肯尼亚标准局（KEBS）共同管理的最低能效标准（MEPS）。肯尼亚依据《能源法》对耗能器具实施标准与标识计划，由KEBS发布相关肯尼亚标准，规定最低能效门槛及测试方法（肯尼亚采用IEC 62552/ISO 15502家用制冷器具测试方法标准）。未达MEPS门槛的电冰箱不得在肯尼亚市场合法投放，进口产品的能效性能作为KEBS PVoC合格评定的一部分予以核验。所测年耗电量及能效等级是强制性肯尼亚能效标签的依据（见frigke-energy-002）。
summary.zht: 在肯亞銷售的家用電冰箱須遵守由能源與石油監管局（EPRA）和肯亞標準局（KEBS）共同管理的最低能效標準（MEPS）。肯亞依據《能源法》對耗能器具實施標準與標識計畫，由KEBS發布相關肯亞標準，規定最低能效門檻及測試方法（肯亞採用IEC 62552/ISO 15502家用製冷器具測試方法標準）。未達MEPS門檻的電冰箱不得在肯亞市場合法投放，進口產品的能效性能作為KEBS PVoC合格評定的一部分予以核驗。所測年耗電量及能效等級是強制性肯亞能效標籤的依據（見frigke-energy-002）。

standards_or_laws: Energy Act, 2019 (Laws of Kenya) — basis for EPRA energy efficiency and conservation, including appliance standards and labelling
KS — Kenya Standard for household refrigerating appliances energy performance and minimum energy performance standards (MEPS), with test method adopted from IEC 62552 / ISO 15502
EPRA Standards and Labelling programme — appliance energy efficiency administered with KEBS
KEBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) — energy performance verified as part of the consignment Certificate of Conformity

summary.en: China's mandatory energy efficiency standard for household refrigerators is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators), which sets energy efficiency grades (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 the minimum threshold) and annual energy consumption limits. It is mandatory (GB), enforced by SAMR, with the China Energy Label administered by NDRC; the test method draws on the IEC 62552 series via GB/T 8059-2016. Although both China and Kenya base their refrigerator energy testing on the IEC 62552 family, the MEPS thresholds, efficiency-class definitions, and reference-consumption formulas differ — a Chinese Grade 1 or Grade 2 rating does not automatically demonstrate compliance with Kenya's MEPS threshold without recalculation to the Kenyan standard.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级），规定能效等级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量限值。该标准为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）执行，中国能效标识由NDRC管理；测试方法通过GB/T 8059-2016参照IEC 62552系列。尽管中国和肯尼亚的电冰箱能效测试均以IEC 62552系列为基础，但MEPS门槛、能效等级定义及参考耗电量公式不同——中国1级或2级评定不自动证明符合肯尼亚MEPS门槛，须按肯尼亚标准重新计算。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級），規定能效等級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量限值。該標準為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）執行，中國能效標識由NDRC管理；測試方法通過GB/T 8059-2016參照IEC 62552系列。儘管中國和肯亞的電冰箱能效測試均以IEC 62552系列為基礎，但MEPS門檻、能效等級定義及參考耗電量公式不同——中國1級或2級評定不自動證明符合肯亞MEPS門檻，須按肯亞標準重新計算。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances (test method standard, aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: Kenya does have a refrigerator MEPS regime, so the gap is one of threshold and verification rather than absence: (1) the Kenyan MEPS threshold and efficiency-class definitions differ from China's GB 12021.2 grade framework — a unit must be assessed against the Kenyan standard, and a Chinese Grade rating cannot be assumed to pass; (2) energy performance is checked inside the KEBS PVoC consignment assessment, so the exporter must provide test data acceptable to the PVoC agent (IEC 62552-based reports are generally usable); (3) exporters should confirm the exact current Kenyan refrigerator MEPS standard number and threshold values with EPRA/KEBS before relying on existing GB 12021.2 results, as MEPS levels are periodically tightened. There is no EU-style EPREL pre-registration database in Kenya; verification is via PVoC and the EPRA/KEBS labelling programme rather than an online product registry.
gap.zh: 肯尼亚确有电冰箱MEPS制度，故差距在于门槛与核验而非缺失：（1）肯尼亚MEPS门槛及能效等级定义与中国GB 12021.2等级框架不同——产品须按肯尼亚标准评定，中国等级评定不能假定通过；（2）能效性能在KEBS PVoC按批评定内核查，故出口商须提供PVoC代理机构可接受的检测数据（基于IEC 62552的报告一般可用）；（3）出口商在依赖现有GB 12021.2结果前，应与EPRA/KEBS确认现行肯尼亚电冰箱MEPS标准编号及门槛值，因MEPS水平会定期收紧。肯尼亚没有欧盟式EPREL预注册数据库；核验通过PVoC及EPRA/KEBS标识计划进行，而非在线产品注册库。
gap.zht: 肯亞確有電冰箱MEPS制度，故差距在於門檻與核驗而非缺失：（1）肯亞MEPS門檻及能效等級定義與中國GB 12021.2等級框架不同——產品須按肯亞標準評定，中國等級評定不能假定通過；（2）能效性能在KEBS PVoC按批評定內核查，故出口商須提供PVoC代理機構可接受的檢測數據（基於IEC 62552的報告一般可用）；（3）出口商在依賴現有GB 12021.2結果前，應與EPRA/KEBS確認現行肯亞電冰箱MEPS標準編號及門檻值，因MEPS水平會定期收緊。肯亞沒有歐盟式EPREL預註冊數據庫；核驗通過PVoC及EPRA/KEBS標識計畫進行，而非線上產品註冊庫。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — refrigerators must meet the Kenyan MEPS threshold (EPRA/KEBS, Energy Act 2019); energy performance is verified within the KEBS PVoC consignment assessment before market placement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

source.publisher: Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority (EPRA), Kenya — Appliances Energy Efficiency

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Kenya operates a refrigerator MEPS regime under EPRA/KEBS (Energy Act 2019), with the test method adopted from IEC 62552 — close to China's GB 12021.2 test basis, but with different thresholds and class definitions. A Chinese energy grade does not automatically pass the Kenyan MEPS; energy performance is verified inside KEBS PVoC, not via an EU-style EPREL registry. Confirm the current Kenyan MEPS standard number and thresholds with EPRA/KEBS before relying on existing GB 12021.2 results.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 肯尼亚依据EPRA/KEBS（《能源法》2019）实施电冰箱MEPS制度，测试方法采用IEC 62552——与中国GB 12021.2测试基础接近，但门槛和等级定义不同。中国能效等级不自动通过肯尼亚MEPS；能效性能在KEBS PVoC内核验，而非通过欧盟式EPREL注册库。在依赖现有GB 12021.2结果前，请与EPRA/KEBS确认现行肯尼亚MEPS标准编号及门槛。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 肯亞依據EPRA/KEBS（《能源法》2019）實施電冰箱MEPS制度，測試方法採用IEC 62552——與中國GB 12021.2測試基礎接近，但門檻和等級定義不同。中國能效等級不自動通過肯亞MEPS；能效性能在KEBS PVoC內核驗，而非通過歐盟式EPREL註冊庫。在依賴現有GB 12021.2結果前，請與EPRA/KEBS確認現行肯亞MEPS標準編號及門檻。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency Label — Kenyan Appliance Energy Label (EPRA/KEBS Standards and Labelling)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标签——肯尼亚器具能效标签（EPRA/KEBS标准与标识）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標籤——肯亞器具能效標籤（EPRA/KEBS標準與標識）

summary.en: Refrigerators placed on the Kenyan market must carry the Kenyan energy efficiency label under the EPRA/KEBS Standards and Labelling programme established pursuant to the Energy Act, 2019. The label communicates the appliance's efficiency rating (a star-rating / efficiency-class scheme) and key energy data such as annual energy consumption, enabling consumers to compare products. The rating shown on the label is derived from testing to the Kenyan refrigerator standard (IEC 62552-based test method) against the applicable MEPS bands. The label must be affixed to the product at point of sale. For imported refrigerators, the energy rating and labelling obligation are checked alongside MEPS as part of the KEBS PVoC conformity assessment, and the importer is responsible for ensuring the correct Kenyan label is displayed.
summary.zh: 投放肯尼亚市场的电冰箱须按依据《能源法》2019设立的EPRA/KEBS标准与标识计划加贴肯尼亚能效标签。该标签传达器具的能效评级（星级/能效等级体系）及年耗电量等关键能源数据，便于消费者比较产品。标签所示评级源自依据肯尼亚电冰箱标准（基于IEC 62552的测试方法）对适用MEPS分级的测试。标签须在销售点加贴于产品上。对进口电冰箱而言，能效评级及标识义务作为KEBS PVoC合格评定的一部分与MEPS一并核查，进口商负责确保展示正确的肯尼亚标签。
summary.zht: 投放肯亞市場的電冰箱須按依據《能源法》2019設立的EPRA/KEBS標準與標識計畫加貼肯亞能效標籤。該標籤傳達器具的能效評級（星級/能效等級體系）及年耗電量等關鍵能源數據，便於消費者比較產品。標籤所示評級源自依據肯亞電冰箱標準（基於IEC 62552的測試方法）對適用MEPS分級的測試。標籤須在銷售點加貼於產品上。對進口電冰箱而言，能效評級及標識義務作為KEBS PVoC合格評定的一部分與MEPS一併核查，進口商負責確保展示正確的肯亞標籤。

standards_or_laws: Energy Act, 2019 (Laws of Kenya) — EPRA mandate for appliance energy efficiency standards and labelling
EPRA/KEBS Standards and Labelling programme — Kenyan appliance energy efficiency label (star-rating / efficiency-class scheme)
KS — Kenya Standard for household refrigerating appliance energy performance (IEC 62552-based test method, underpinning the label rating)
KEBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) — labelling/energy rating verified within the consignment Certificate of Conformity

summary.en: China's energy labelling for household refrigerators is the China Energy Label (CEL) under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR, 2016 revision). The CEL displays a 1-to-5 grade scale (1 highest, 5 minimum threshold) plus annual energy consumption, administered by the China National Institute of Standardization (CNIS) under NDRC/SAMR; manufacturers self-declare the grade based on GB 12021.2 testing. The Chinese CEL and the Kenyan energy efficiency label are separate national labels with different formats and rating scales; the China Energy Label cannot serve as the Kenyan label, and the underlying rating must be recomputed against the Kenyan standard.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的能效标识为依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修订）的中国能效标识（CEL）。CEL展示1至5级评级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量，由NDRC/SAMR下属中国标准化研究院（CNIS）管理；制造商依据GB 12021.2检测自我声明等级。中国CEL与肯尼亚能效标签是格式和评级体系不同的独立国家标签；中国能效标识不能充当肯尼亚标签，其底层评级须按肯尼亚标准重新计算。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的能效標識為依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修訂）的中國能效標識（CEL）。CEL展示1至5級評級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量，由NDRC/SAMR下屬中國標準化研究院（CNIS）管理；製造商依據GB 12021.2檢測自我聲明等級。中國CEL與肯亞能效標籤是格式和評級體系不同的獨立國家標籤；中國能效標識不能充當肯亞標籤，其底層評級須按肯亞標準重新計算。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework
GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (underlying grade standard)

gap.en: The labelling obligation exists in both countries but the labels are not interchangeable: (1) the China Energy Label (1-to-5 grade) cannot be used as the Kenyan label — the Kenyan EPRA/KEBS label has its own format and rating scale and must be applied based on a rating computed against the Kenyan standard; (2) the rating shown must come from IEC 62552-based testing assessed to the Kenyan MEPS/class bands, so the Chinese grade must be translated/recomputed, not copied; (3) the in-country importer is responsible for ensuring the correct Kenyan label is displayed at point of sale, and label/energy compliance is checked within KEBS PVoC. Unlike the EU, there is no EPREL-style online pre-registration database — there is no separate database filing step, which simplifies the process relative to the EU even though a distinct physical label is still required.
gap.zh: 两国均有标识义务，但标签不可互换：（1）中国能效标识（1至5级）不能用作肯尼亚标签——肯尼亚EPRA/KEBS标签有自身格式和评级体系，须基于按肯尼亚标准计算的评级加贴；（2）所示评级须来自基于IEC 62552的测试并按肯尼亚MEPS/等级分级评定，故中国等级须转换/重新计算，而非照搬；（3）境内进口商负责确保在销售点展示正确的肯尼亚标签，标签/能效合规在KEBS PVoC内核查。与欧盟不同，肯尼亚无EPREL式在线预注册数据库——无单独的数据库申报步骤，相对欧盟而言流程更简，尽管仍须加贴独立的实体标签。
gap.zht: 兩國均有標識義務，但標籤不可互換：（1）中國能效標識（1至5級）不能用作肯亞標籤——肯亞EPRA/KEBS標籤有自身格式和評級體系，須基於按肯亞標準計算的評級加貼；（2）所示評級須來自基於IEC 62552的測試並按肯亞MEPS/等級分級評定，故中國等級須轉換/重新計算，而非照搬；（3）境內進口商負責確保在銷售點展示正確的肯亞標籤，標籤/能效合規在KEBS PVoC內核查。與歐盟不同，肯亞無EPREL式線上預註冊數據庫——無單獨的數據庫申報步驟，相對歐盟而言流程更簡，儘管仍須加貼獨立的實體標籤。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Kenyan energy efficiency label required at point of sale under EPRA/KEBS Standards and Labelling (Energy Act 2019); verified within KEBS PVoC. No EU-style EPREL online pre-registration database exists.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

source.publisher: Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority (EPRA), Kenya — Appliances Energy Efficiency / Standards and Labelling

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Kenyan EPRA/KEBS energy efficiency label is mandatory for refrigerators at point of sale, with the rating derived from IEC 62552-based testing against Kenyan MEPS bands. The China Energy Label (1-to-5 grade) cannot substitute — the rating must be recomputed and the Kenyan label applied. Unlike the EU, Kenya has no EPREL-style online pre-registration database; labelling/energy compliance is checked within KEBS PVoC and is the importer's responsibility at point of sale.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 肯尼亚EPRA/KEBS能效标签为电冰箱在销售点的强制要求，评级源自基于IEC 62552的测试并按肯尼亚MEPS分级评定。中国能效标识（1至5级）不能替代——须重新计算评级并加贴肯尼亚标签。与欧盟不同，肯尼亚无EPREL式在线预注册数据库；标识/能效合规在KEBS PVoC内核查，并由进口商在销售点负责。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 肯亞EPRA/KEBS能效標籤為電冰箱在銷售點的強制要求，評級源自基於IEC 62552的測試並按肯亞MEPS分級評定。中國能效標識（1至5級）不能替代——須重新計算評級並加貼肯亞標籤。與歐盟不同，肯亞無EPREL式線上預註冊數據庫；標識/能效合規在KEBS PVoC內核查，並由進口商在銷售點負責。
